summary: Iteration 61: Branch Transfer Enhanced Workflow (Phase 1) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All enhanced form features verified working correctly.

issues: Multiple React hydration warnings about span elements inside tr/tbody/th - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

GENERATE_BRANCH_TRANSFER_API.returns_requested_qty: PASS - API returns requested_qty per item from original stock request
GENERATE_BRANCH_TRANSFER_API.returns_available_stock: PASS - API returns available_stock from source branch inventory
GENERATE_BRANCH_TRANSFER_API.auto_defaults_send_qty: PASS - qty defaults to min(requested_qty, available_stock)
GENERATE_BRANCH_TRANSFER_API.sets_po_status_to_in_progress: PASS - Stock request PO status updates to 'in_progress'

TRANSFER_CREATION_WITH_REQUEST_LINK.stores_request_po_id: PASS - Transfer order stores request_po_id linking back to request
TRANSFER_CREATION_WITH_REQUEST_LINK.stores_request_po_number: PASS - Transfer order stores request_po_number for display

REQUEST_STATUS_UPDATES_ON_RECEIVE.fulfilled_status: PASS - When transfer received, request PO updates to 'fulfilled'
REQUEST_STATUS_UPDATES_ON_RECEIVE.partially_fulfilled_status: PASS - Updates to 'partially_fulfilled' when qty < requested

STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB_UI.tab_visible_in_history: PASS - Stock Requests tab visible with badge count (5)
STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB_UI.generate_transfer_button: PASS - 'Generate Transfer' button visible for 'requested' status
STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB_UI.transfer_in_progress_button: PASS - 'Transfer In Progress' shown for in_progress status
STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB_UI.fulfilled_status_badge: PASS - Green 'fulfilled' badge + checkmark + BTO number shown

ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.request_context_banner: PASS - Blue banner shows 'Fulfilling Stock Request PO-xxx' with Cancel button
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.requested_column_header: PASS - 'REQUESTED by branch' column header visible
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.available_column_header: PASS - 'AVAILABLE in stock' column header visible
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.send_column_header: PASS - 'SEND' column header visible (replaces 'Qty' in enhanced mode)
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.requested_qty_value: PASS - Shows requested qty (e.g., '5') in blue text
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.available_stock_value: PASS - Shows available stock (e.g., '32') in green/amber text
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.from_to_branch_prefilled: PASS - From/To branches pre-filled from request data
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.product_data_prefilled: PASS - Product name, SKU, branch capital pre-filled
ENHANCED_TRANSFER_FORM_UI.toast_notification: PASS - Shows 'Transfer pre-filled from PO-xxx! Review quantities and set pricing.'

ROLE_BASED_PRICING.admin_can_edit_retail: PASS - Branch Retail input is ENABLED for admin user
ROLE_BASED_PRICING.admin_sets_retail_hint: N/A - Only visible for non-admin users (not tested in this iteration)

TRANSFER_DETAIL_DIALOG.status_timeline: PASS - Shows step indicators: Requested → Transfer Created → Sent → Received → Settled
TRANSFER_DETAIL_DIALOG.request_po_reference: PASS - Shows 'From stock request: TEST-SR-xxx' when from a stock request

HISTORY_LIST.request_po_number_display: PASS - Shows 'from PO-xxx' under transfer order number for linked transfers

critical_code_review_comments: Backend generate-branch-transfer correctly fetches available_stock from inventory collection
Frontend skipResetRef prevents useEffect from clearing pre-filled data when loading from request
Status updates work correctly: requested → in_progress → fulfilled/partially_fulfilled
Role-based Branch Retail field properly checks isAdmin before disabling
Form correctly shows enhanced columns only when requestContext is set
seed_data_creation: Created test stock request PO-20260226113757-3514 from IPIL BRANCH
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified the enhanced branch-to-branch stock request workflow (Phase 1). The generate-branch-transfer endpoint now returns requested_qty and available_stock per item. The frontend enhanced form shows Requested/Available/Send columns when generated from a stock request. skipResetRef prevents form data from being cleared. Status timeline in transfer detail dialog shows all steps. Request PO status updates to fulfilled/partially_fulfilled when transfer is received. Admin can edit Branch Retail, non-admin sees it disabled with 'Admin sets retail' hint. All tests pass.
